parameters.query: SELECT message FROM n8n_chat_histories WHERE session_id = 'tg:' || '@@CHAT_ID@@' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 50;

messageValues.message: Extract a JSON style profile from these chat messages. Schema: { "language_primary": string, "formality": string, "avg_reply_length_words": number, "emoji_use": string, "humor": string, "technical_depth": string, "address_form": string, "anti_patterns": [string] }. Return ONLY the JSON object, no markdown, no code fences, no prose.
